candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line; preferred over duplicate total.
Duplicate revenue total that matches Revenue and can serve as fallback label across years.
Not operating revenue; finance item.
Bottom-line profit concept, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive income for the financial year
candidates.why: Comprehensive income, not revenue.
Balance sheet asset, not revenue.

variables.notes: Used revenue labels as a priority list, most preferred first. Do not sum them.

candidates.why: Best direct cost/cost of sales style line; broad production/service input cost bucket.
Component of materials and services, but not complete across years and narrower than the broader cost bucket.
Balancing row explicitly excluded.

variables.notes: Selected the broad direct-cost line rather than narrower components.

candidates.why: Possible overhead component, but sparse and likely partial.
Core operating overhead/personnel cost component.
Subcomponent of employee benefit expenses; avoid when broader component exists.
Overhead-related component, but typically embedded within employee expenses and sparse.
Core overhead bucket and closest operating-expense component outside labor.
Explicit SG&A row; under hierarchy this is preferred when present.

candidates.row_label: The Office of the Data Protection Ombudsman - An administrative fine
candidates.why: One-off administrative fine, not recurring SG&A.
Balance sheet asset, not SG&A expense.
Balance sheet gross asset, not SG&A expense.
Operating metric, not expense row.

variables.notes: An explicit SG&A row exists, so selected only that row per hierarchy rule (a). Did not add employee or other operating expense rows to avoid overcounting broader overhead outside SG&A.

candidates.why: R&D asset capitalization line on balance sheet, not income statement expense.
Gross balance sheet asset, not period expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Amortization/impairment contra-asset, not R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs, Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing row, not expense.

variables.notes: No dedicated R&D expense row appears on the income statement. Balance sheet R&D capitalization rows are not valid XRD expense mappings.

candidates.why: Total finance-cost line, but components exist so less preferred.
Recurring interest component; valid part of financing cost.
Recurring interest component; strong match.
Recurring finance-cost component; acceptable to include when granular components are used.

candidates.row_label: Interest and other financial expenses to other
candidates.why: Semantically relevant but appears unpopulated here and less direct than existing components.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of lease liability interest; avoid double counting.
Balance sheet liability, not interest expense.

variables.notes: Preferred granular recurring finance-cost components over the aggregate Finance costs row. Excluded supplemental lease-interest row to avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Realized changes in fair values of equity investments
candidates.why: Income statement gain/loss, not book equity.

candidates.row_label: Changes in fair values of equity investments
candidates.why: Income statement valuation change, not book equity.
Income allocation line, not balance sheet equity.
Asset line, not shareholders' equity.
Equity component only, not full book equity.
Best available total equity line on balance sheet.
Duplicate capitalization variant of total equity; useful fallback across years.
Shareholder count, not equity.

variables.notes: No owner/parent-only equity or non-controlling interest line is visible, so used Total equity as BE and left MIB empty to avoid double counting.
